details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - entity.nina
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/northstar_email.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 4 invoices linked to Nina.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checklist: attachments were all read in-task and ordered newest-first (2026-01-17, 2025-12-01, 2025-11-03, 2025-10-06); recipient matches canonical Miles email; subject with colon-space was quoted. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Outbound email draft was written at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

I processed lowest inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md, verified sender identity via 10_entities/cast/miles.md, identified Nina-linked invoices via canonical evidence and finance records, wrote one outbound draft with the oldest 4 Nina-linked invoices (attachments ordered newest-first per outbox rule), and deleted the processed inbox file. Completeness check: Nina-linked invoices found = 5 (INV-0001..INV-0005), selected oldest 4 by issue date = INV-0001,0002,0003,0004. No arithmetic required.

function.message: Handled the next inbox message by drafting a reply email with the requested invoice bundle and clearing the inbox item. Created `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md` addressed to `miles@novak.example` with the oldest 4 invoices linked to Nina attached (INV-0001 through INV-0004; attachments ordered newest-first per outbox policy), then deleted `00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used inbox and sending-email workflows, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, read source invoices before forwarding, performed single outbox write, and enforced attachments newest-first.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request explicitly asked for the oldest 4 invoices linked to Nina. Canonical and invoice evidence showed five Nina-linked invoices, and the four oldest by issue date were INV-0001 (2025-10-06), INV-0002 (2025-11-03), INV-0003 (2025-12-01), and INV-0004 (2026-01-17). These exact files were attached in the outbound draft, and the processed inbox item was deleted.
